title: OwnTheJoke.com
summary: E-commerce platform printing custom humor on apparels, wall hangings, and accessories. Features interactive 3D product mockups with Three.js, Paystack payments, flash sales, an affiliate system, and a content blog with Tiptap editor.
overview: OwnTheJoke is a humor-driven e-commerce platform where customers can browse and purchase printed items including apparel, wall hangings, and various accessories. The standout technical feature is interactive 3D product mockups powered by Three.js and React Three Fiber, allowing customers to rotate, zoom, and inspect products before purchasing. The platform includes a full e-commerce backend with inventory management, a flash sale system, an affiliate program, and a blog for content marketing.
problem: Standard e-commerce platforms cannot deliver the interactive product visualization that physical humor products demand. Customers need to see how a joke will look on a shirt or wall hanging before committing. Static images fail to capture the experience. The platform needed 3D product mockups alongside a robust e-commerce backend.
role: Built the complete e-commerce stack from storefront to payment processing
Implemented 3D product visualization with Three.js and React Three Fiber
Built the flash sale engine with time-based pricing and inventory management
Developed the affiliate tracking system for referral-based growth
Created the blog system with Tiptap rich text editor for content marketing
architecture: React 19 frontend with Vite and Zustand for state management
Three.js with React Three Fiber for interactive 3D product mockups
Express backend with PostgreSQL and Prisma ORM
Paystack payment integration for African market card and mobile money support
Flash sale engine with scheduled pricing, countdown timers, and inventory locks
Affiliate tracking system with unique referral codes and commission calculation
Tiptap rich text editor for blog content creation and management
ULID-based identifiers for URL-safe, chronologically sortable entity references

results.title: 3D Product Mockups
results.detail: Interactive Three.js visualization allowing customers to rotate, zoom, and inspect printed products in real time.

results.title: Flash Sales
results.detail: Time-based promotional engine with automatic pricing adjustments, countdown timers, and inventory lock management.

results.title: Affiliate Program
results.detail: Referral tracking system with unique codes, commission calculation, and payout management.

lessonsLearned: 3D product visualization significantly increases time-on-page and conversion intent, but requires careful optimization for mobile devices.
Flash sale systems need atomic inventory operations. Race conditions during high-traffic sales windows can oversell products.
Humor products have unpredictable demand curves. The inventory system needs to handle sudden viral spikes.
